analysis_result: HALLMARK_HEDGEHOG_SIGNALING (closest analog to 'SHH Pathway' in Fig 3d): NES = 0.937, FDR q-val = 0.5452 (MPNST_G1 vs all other methylation groups; positive NES indicates enrichment in MPNST-G1). NOTE: This reproduction does not exactly match the paper's published values; several SHH/Hedgehog gene sets were tested with 5000-perm phenotype GSEA and all showed non-significant FDR (>0.5) in this small n=6 vs 42 comparison.
denominator_used: 6 MPNST_G1 samples vs 42 other (non-G1) samples, MPNST_G1 vs OTHER phenotype contrast
assumptions_made: Contrast MPNST_G1 vs all other methylation groups (n=6 vs 42); signal-to-noise ranking with 5000 phenotype permutations; seed=42; HALLMARK_HEDGEHOG_SIGNALING used as best standard analog to 'SHH Pathway' label; alternative results: KEGG Hedgehog NES=-0.890/FDR=0.626, Reactome NES=0.956/FDR=1.000, WikiPathway NES=-1.155/FDR=0.526
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
- GSE207400_Matrix.txt.gz: log-normalized RNA-seq matrix, 14,992 unique genes (after deduplication), 48 samples
- 41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx Clinical Data sheet: 49 samples with RNA-Seq flag; Methylation_Group and Tumor_ID for mapping

B. COHORT / SAMPLE MAPPING
- Mapped clinical Tumor_ID to matrix column names (direct match, 48/48)
- MPNST_G1 samples: 6 (M803, M1014, M2252, M2346, M2372, M3048)
- OTHER samples (non-G1): 42 (MPNST_G2=6, PremalignantNF_G3=18, Benign_NF_G4=9, Sporadic Spinal NF_G5=9)
- MPNST_G2 samples: 6

C. VARIABLE CODING
- Contrast: MPNST_G1 (positive phenotype) vs OTHER (reference)
- Ranking metric: signal-to-noise
- Permutation test: phenotype permutation, 5000 permutations, seed=42

D. COMPUTATION
- gseapy.gsea() with multiple Hedgehog/SHH gene sets (MSigDB Hallmark 2020, KEGG 2021, Reactome 2022, WikiPathway, BioCarta SHH)
- Primary match to paper's 'SHH Pathway' label: HALLMARK_HEDGEHOG_SIGNALING (36 genes)

E. RESULT (MPNST_G1 vs OTHER)
- HALLMARK_HEDGEHOG_SIGNALING: NES = 0.937, FDR q-val = 0.5452, NOM p-val = 0.5496
- Other SHH-related gene sets tested (for reference):
  - WP_HEDGEHOG_SIGNALING: NES=-1.155, FDR=0.5256
  - REACTOME_SIGNALING_BY_HEDGEHOG: NES=0.956, FDR=1.0000
  - HALLMARK_HEDGEHOG_SIGNALING: NES=0.937, FDR=0.5452
  - KEGG_HEDGEHOG_SIGNALING: NES=-0.890, FDR=0.6264

F. CAVEATS
- Direction: positive NES means enriched in MPNST_G1 phenotype (higher expression).
- Small group sizes (n=6 MPNST_G1) limit statistical power; phenotype permutation may be unstable.
- Multiple Hedgehog/SHH MSigDB gene sets were tested; the 'SHH Pathway' in Fig 3d of the paper likely refers to HALLMARK_HEDGEHOG_SIGNALING or a similar curated set.
- Reproduction of the paper's exact NES/FDR requires identical methodology (exact gene set version, GSEA software parameters). The paper likely reported NES > 0 indicating enrichment in MPNST_G1, which is directionally consistent with our Hallmark result (NES=+0.93).
